_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Report intelligence-derived significant network events and intrusions.
reference_document_element_description: Implement and operate data observability infrastructure that provides pipeline lineage, execution history, data quality metrics, and proactive alerting for anomalies and SLA violations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.409), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.388).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.215). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [derived, events, intelligence, intrusions, network, report] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, anomalies, data, execution, history, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.870, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Report intelligence-derived significant network events and intrusions." and "Implement and operate data observability infrastructure that provides pipeline l" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.411 > STS 0.215 (gap +0.195). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [derived, events, intelligence, intrusions, network, report]. WIDAI terms: [alerting, anomalies, data, execution, history, implement].
